← BACK TO DOSSIER
CASE FILE #04h

THE MAFIA DEAL

Date: 11/30/2015

"Every deal has a price. Every alliance requires trust. Every escape demands precision."

CLASSIFICATION: TOP SECRET
ACCESS LEVEL: SHADOW PROTOCOL PERSONNEL ONLY

Mission Summary

Torretti presents sophisticated escape plan using manufactured legal bail process.

Alpha negotiates intelligence sharing as condition for participation.

₹80 lakh bail amount established as cover for elaborate extraction operation.

Strategic alliance formed combining Alpha's skills with Torretti's resources.

Key Evidence

Bargain Transcript

Recorded negotiation between Alpha and Torretti with gradual redaction reveals.

#negotiation#classified

Bail Documentation (₹80)

Legal papers showing ₹80 lakh bail arrangement with interactive motif highlighting.

#legal#motif

Intelligence Package

Information Alpha extracts from Torretti regarding criminal networks and contacts.

#intelligence#networks

Mission Outcome
